mission: Operate and grow the Jenok automotive business using public, authorised and owner-provided evidence while maintaining a normalized catalogue, fitment intelligence, supplier operations, sales systems and auditable business controls.
governance: Collect only publicly accessible catalogue data or owner-authorised sources.
Respect robots.txt, site terms, rate limits, copyright and authentication boundaries.
Do not bypass login, CAPTCHA, paywall or access controls.
Maintain crawl coverage, failed URL and changed-field reports.
Do not claim complete catalogue coverage without a measured URL denominator and validation sample.
Require owner approval for public deployment, paid infrastructure, supplier contact or data publication.

blockers.detail: Exact Jenok source files, catalogue URLs, supplier feeds and historical chat bodies are not fully ingested.
Hosting, credentials, databases and production endpoints are not approved or proven.
Current legal entity, accounting, supplier, warranty, fulfilment and channel rules require authoritative source documents.
